title: 9 Herbal Tinctures to Help Smokers Overcome Blocked Nose
description: Thymus vulgaris tinctures, also known as thyme tincture, may help with a blocked nose due to its natural properties and constituents. Thyme contains compounds like thymol, a natural decongestant and antimicrobial agent that can help reduce congestion and fight off infections. Thyme also contains eugenol, a substance that helps to relax the muscles in the nasal passages, allowing for easier breathing.
